title: Cooking with Create
description: Adds some extra foods into create
body:
Adds few foods into your factory lines.


 --------------------------------------------------

Food examples:

Crimson Stew

Warped Stew

Blazing potato

Stuffed potato

Sandwich

  --------------------------------------------------


Recipes:

Crimson stew - Mix water, salt and Crimson Fungi

Warped stew - Mix water, sugar and Warped Fungus

Blazing potato - Spout water on a potato

Sandwich and stuffed potato can be crafted normally

 --------------------------------------------------
 

Extra:
Salt can be found in sand only in ocean biomes
